name: Nautilus Series
description: The Nautilus series represents the pinnacle of luxury and craftsmanship in the AB Inflatables lineup. Engineered as a high-end yacht tender, it combines an elegant design with a high-performance deep-V fiberglass hull. Each model is finished with premium appointments, including handcrafted upholstery, integrated storage, and a sophisticated console, ensuring a superior experience for both owners and guests.
features: Hydraulic Steering System (standard on most models)
Fresh Water System with Shower & Internal Tank
Integrated Stainless Steel Bow Rails & Cleats
Integrated Marine Grade Aluminum Fuel Tank
Fiberglass Console with Windshield & Stainless Steel Rail

variants.name: Nautilus 11 DLX
variants.description: A compact luxury tender that provides the amenities of a larger boat in a size suitable for mid-sized yachts.

variants.name: Nautilus 12 DLX
variants.description: Features an expanded beam and seating layout for enhanced guest comfort.

variants.name: Nautilus 13 DLX
variants.description: A versatile mid-range luxury tender with optimized deck space and increased storage.

variants.name: Nautilus 14 DLX
variants.description: Offers a sophisticated balance of performance and interior luxury for larger crews.

variants.name: Nautilus 15 DLX
variants.description: A spacious 15-foot platform featuring premium finishes and offshore capability.

variants.name: Nautilus 17 DLX
variants.description: Designed for long-range guest transport with significant fuel capacity and comfort.

variants.name: Nautilus 19 DLX
variants.description: The flagship luxury model with expansive seating and superior sea-keeping.

name: Oceanus Series
description: The Oceanus series is designed for the serious boater who demands performance, versatility, and range. Featuring an extra-deep V fiberglass hull, these console RIBs provide a smooth, dry ride even in choppy conditions. With integrated fuel tanks and ample seating, they are ideal for long-distance cruising, watersports, and professional use.
features: Extra Deep V-Hull for offshore performance
Fiberglass Console with Plexiglass Windshield & Grab Rail
Integrated Marine Grade Aluminum Fuel Tank
Molded-In Rear Seat with Ample Storage
Stainless Steel Bow and Stern Cleats
Fresh Water Tank & Shower (on larger models)

variants.name: Oceanus 11 VST
variants.description: The most compact model in the Oceanus line, providing high-performance features in a size manageable for smaller davits.

variants.name: Oceanus 12 VST
variants.description: A popular choice for luxury yacht tenders, offering increased seating and stability.

variants.name: Oceanus 13 VST
variants.description: Mid-range tender with enhanced storage and a dedicated anchor locker.

variants.name: Oceanus 14 VST
variants.description: Spacious console boat with a reinforced hull for towing and heavy use.

variants.name: Oceanus 15 VST
variants.description: A versatile mid-sized console RIB offering a balance of deck space and easy handling.

variants.name: Oceanus 17 VST
variants.description: Designed for coastal cruising with an expanded beam and significant range.

variants.name: Oceanus 19 VST
variants.description: A popular model for offshore cruising, featuring a 130hp max rating and significant fuel capacity.

variants.name: Oceanus 21 VST
variants.description: High-performance cruiser with standard hydraulic steering and luxury finishes.

variants.name: Oceanus 24 VST
variants.description: A large-scale RIB for group excursions, professional charters, and rough water support.

variants.name: Oceanus 28 VST
variants.description: The flagship of the series, built for extreme offshore conditions with a massive 500hp capacity and seating for 25.

name: Mares Series
description: The Mares is designed as a highly practical, space-saving sport console tender. Featuring a unique foldable console, it is intended for yacht owners who require a console-steered boat that can still fit into height-restricted garages or davit systems. Its fiberglass hull ensures a smooth ride while keeping the overall weight manageable.
features: Mechanical Steering System & Sport Steering Wheel
Stainless Steel Bow Eye & Davit Lifting Points

variants.name: Mares 10 VSX
variants.description: A lightweight, entry-level console tender that prioritizes portability and storage efficiency.

variants.name: Mares 11 VSX
variants.description: The mid-range Mares model providing an ideal balance of deck space and compact storage dimensions.

variants.name: Mares 12 VSX
variants.description: The largest in the Mares line, offering improved seating comfort and a stable platform for five passengers.

name: Alumina Series
description: The Alumina series represents a breakthrough in aluminum console RIBs. By combining a lightweight, rugged marine-grade aluminum hull with a full-featured console and seating arrangement, the Alumina offers the durability required for beaching on rocky shores without the weight penalties of fiberglass. It features a spacious deck, integrated fuel tanks in larger models, and a high-quality finish including Chrome-Free Pretreatment and Powder Coating.
features: Integrated Aluminum Console and Rear Seat
Mechanical Steering System & Sport Steering Wheel

variants.name: Alumina 9.5 ALX
variants.description: The most compact console model in the Alumina line, ideal for smaller yacht davits.

variants.name: Alumina 10 ALX
variants.description: A lightweight aluminum console RIB designed for durability and ease of handling.

variants.name: Alumina 11 ALX
variants.description: Mid-sized aluminum console tender with increased cockpit space.

variants.name: Alumina 12 ALX
variants.description: Versatile 12-foot aluminum RIB offering excellent stability and payload.

variants.name: Alumina 13 ALX
variants.description: Spacious aluminum console boat designed for larger crews and watersports.

variants.name: Alumina 14 ALX
variants.description: A high-performance aluminum tender with expanded fuel and passenger capacity.

variants.name: Alumina 15 ALX
variants.description: Large 15-foot aluminum console RIB for offshore cruising and support.

variants.name: Alumina 16 ALX
variants.description: Near the top of the range, offering a 90hp max rating and superior deck space.

variants.name: Alumina 18 ALX
variants.description: The flagship of the Alumina series, providing maximum performance and seating.

name: Navigo Series
description: The Navigo series is renowned for its unique forward-hull design, which provides significantly more interior space than traditional RIBs. Its double-hull construction ensures a flat, dry deck, making it one of the most popular open fiberglass tenders for both cruisers and professional users who require maximum floor space and durability.
features: Double Floor for a dry deck
Integrated Bow Locker (fits portable fuel tank)

variants.name: Navigo 8 VS
variants.description: Compact double-floor tender for small-to-mid sized cruisers.

variants.name: Navigo 9 VS
variants.description: The quintessential mid-sized open tender, balancing weight and capacity.

variants.name: Navigo 10 VS
variants.description: The most popular mid-sized open tender in the Navigo line, offering a spacious 10-foot platform.

variants.name: Navigo 12 VS
variants.description: Expanded length and beam for increased stability and payload capacity.

variants.name: Navigo 13 VS
variants.description: High-capacity open tender designed for larger crews and equipment hauling.

variants.name: Navigo 14 VS
variants.description: A spacious 14-foot platform with significant dry deck area.

variants.name: Navigo 15 VS
variants.description: The flagship of the open fiberglass series, offering maximum interior volume.

name: Ventus Series
description: The Ventus series is specifically engineered for boaters who need a high-quality fiberglass RIB but are restricted by davit weight limits. It features a lightweight single-hull design with a deep-V profile, offering a smooth, dry ride while remaining one of the lightest fiberglass inflatables on the market.
features: Deep 'V' Hull Design for superior tracking

variants.name: Ventus 8 VB
variants.description: The lightest in the fiberglass range, ideal for manual beaching and small davits.

variants.name: Ventus 9 VB
variants.description: A compact, lightweight tender that tracks beautifully thanks to its deep-V hull.

variants.name: Ventus 10 VB
variants.description: A lightweight 10-foot tender offering more buoyancy than the 8 and 9 without significant weight gain.

variants.name: Ventus 12 VB
variants.description: The largest model in the Ventus line, providing maximum interior space for a minimal weight penalty.

name: Lammina AL Series
description: The Lammina AL series is the versatile workhorse of the AB lineup. These open-deck tenders feature a high-quality 3.18mm marine-grade aluminum hull that is chrome-free pretreated and powder-coated. Designed for durability in abrasive environments, they offer a flat, stable double floor for a dry deck and a large bow locker for integrated fuel storage and equipment.
features: Aluminum Internal and External Transom Plates

variants.name: Lammina 8 AL
variants.description: A compact, rugged 8-foot aluminum tender perfect for limited davit capacities.

variants.name: Lammina 9 AL
variants.description: The 9-foot model offers a perfect balance of interior space and lightweight maneuverability.

variants.name: Lammina 10 AL
variants.description: The most popular mid-sized aluminum tender in the AL series.

variants.name: Lammina 11 AL
variants.description: Expanded length for better tracking and increased passenger comfort.

variants.name: Lammina 12 AL
variants.description: A versatile open tender with significant payload for gear and crew.

variants.name: Lammina 13 AL
variants.description: Mid-sized aluminum tender offering high payload capacity and increased horsepower rating.

variants.name: Lammina 14 AL
variants.description: Large capacity utility aluminum RIB for hauling heavy loads.

variants.name: Lammina 15 AL
variants.description: Spacious 15-foot platform with wide beam for superior stability.

variants.name: Lammina 16 AL
variants.description: The largest in the AL range, bridging the gap between tender and utility boat.

name: AB Rider
description: A crossover between a personal watercraft and a RIB, featuring a jockey-style seat and high-performance hull.

name: ABJET S-Series
description: The ABJET S-Series is the core jet propulsion line from AB Inflatables, designed to combine high-performance Rotax® power with a low-profile deck arrangement. These tenders are engineered specifically for yacht garages and platforms, offering the safety of a propeller-free drive and the agility required for watersports and guest transport.
features: Low Profile Design for Yacht Garages
Automatic Fire Extinguisher and Bilge Pump

variants.name: ABJET 290
variants.description: The most compact model, specifically built to fit the dimensions of smaller yacht garages without compromising power.

variants.name: ABJET 330
variants.description: A mid-size jet tender that balances maneuverability with a 5-person seating capacity.

variants.name: ABJET 350
variants.description: A high-performance model designed for watersports, featuring a 150hp Rotax engine as standard.

variants.name: ABJET 380
variants.description: Offers increased deck space and buoyancy, suitable for larger crews and heavier payloads.

variants.name: ABJET 430
variants.description: The flagship of the S-Series, offering the maximum seating and fuel capacity for long-distance transport.

name: Profile A Series
description: The Profile A series consists of professional-grade aluminum hull RIBs engineered for high-intensity commercial, rescue, and military applications. These boats feature reinforced hulls with 3.18mm (1/8") marine-grade aluminum and specialized configurations designed to handle extreme payloads and demanding sea states.
features: Multiple Air Chambers (3 to 5 depending on model)
Reinforced Aluminum Lifting Points and Towing Rings

construction.material: Marine Grade Aluminum Hull / ORCA (CSM) Hypalon Tubes

variants.name: Profile 10 A
variants.description: Compact professional model for rapid deployment and utility tasks.

variants.name: Profile 11 A
variants.description: Standard mid-sized professional RIB with increased buoyancy and deck space.

variants.name: Profile 12 A
variants.description: Extended utility model designed for crew transport and light cargo.

variants.name: Profile 13 A
variants.description: Heavy-duty variant with optimized hull geometry for chop.

variants.name: Profile 14 A
variants.description: Large platform for dive teams and professional rescue operations.

variants.name: Profile 15 A
variants.description: High-capacity professional RIB with a 50hp rating for heavy loads.

variants.name: Profile 16 A
variants.description: Advanced commercial model with expanded beam for superior stability.

variants.name: Profile 18 A
variants.description: The flagship of the A-series, offering maximum payload and high-horsepower capacity for offshore utility.

name: Lammina UL Series
description: The Lammina Ultra Light (UL) is specifically engineered for weight-sensitive applications. By utilizing a single-hull design (no double floor), AB has achieved a significant weight reduction without compromising the structural integrity of the marine-grade aluminum. It is the premier choice for sailors and powerboaters with light-duty davits or those who manually beach their craft.

variants.name: Lammina 7.5 UL
variants.description: The lightest RIB in the AB lineup, designed for single-handed operation and tiny davit systems.

variants.name: Lammina 8 UL
variants.description: A highly portable 8-foot tender that maintains a manageable 30kg weight for easy launching.

variants.name: Lammina 9 UL
variants.description: The ideal balance of length and weight, offering better tracking and stability in a sub-40kg package.

variants.name: Lammina 10 UL
variants.description: The largest ultra-light model, providing the most interior volume while remaining light enough for two people to carry.

name: ABJET XP Series
description: The ABJET XP (Extreme Performance) is the top-tier jet tender line, featuring upgraded engine configurations and high-end finishes. It offers superior acceleration and a layout optimized for both luxury guest transport and high-speed towing.
features: Tilt Steering and Carbon Fiber Accents
Battery Switch and Automatic Bilge Pump

variants.name: ABJET 290 XP
variants.description: Ultra-compact performance jet tender designed for height-restricted garages.

variants.name: ABJET 330 XP
variants.description: Performance-tuned compact jet tender with increased agility.

variants.name: ABJET 350 XP
variants.description: Mid-sized performance model offering superior power-to-weight ratio.

variants.name: ABJET 380 XP
variants.description: Spacious performance tender with expanded seating for six passengers.

variants.name: ABJET 430 XP
variants.description: High-capacity luxury jet tender with 170hp standard for performance cruising.

variants.name: ABJET 450 XP
variants.description: The flagship of the XP series, offering maximum deck space and high-speed stability.

name: ABJET Diesel Series
description: Designed for yachts that operate exclusively on diesel fuel, the ABJET Diesel series eliminates the need to carry gasoline onboard. Powered by Yanmar diesel engines coupled with high-performance jet drives, these tenders provide exceptional safety, fuel commonality, and the impressive torque required for heavy payloads and watersports. The series is engineered with a low profile to fit into modern yacht garages and features a reinforced fiberglass hull to handle the demands of professional-grade operations.
features: Reinforced Engine Bed and Fiberglass Hull
Heavy Duty Lifting Points for Yacht Davits
Large Service Hatch for easy engine access
Automatic Fire Extinguisher and Bilge Pump

variants.name: ABJET 380 Diesel
variants.description: The most compact diesel jet model, ideal for mid-sized yacht garages requiring diesel fuel commonality.

variants.name: ABJET 435 Diesel
variants.description: The mid-sized diesel jet tender balancing weight and passenger capacity for larger yachts.

variants.name: ABJET 465 Diesel
variants.description: The flagship diesel variant, offering the highest payload and performance in the diesel lineup.

name: Profile A-XHD Series
description: The Profile A-XHD (Extra Heavy Duty) series is the most rugged aluminum hull RIB in the AB lineup. Specifically engineered for law enforcement, military, and extreme commercial operations, these boats feature a reinforced 4.7mm (3/16") marine-grade aluminum hull and 1670 D-Tex ORCA (CSM) fabric. Built to withstand high-impact environments and heavy professional use, the XHD series offers unparalleled durability and longevity in the field.
features: Triple Rub Rail (Double Lateral + Top Guard)
Heavy-Duty Lifting Points and Towing Eyes

variants.name: Profile 14 A-XHD
variants.description: The compact tactical variant, balancing portability with extreme hull thickness for littoral operations.

variants.name: Profile 15 A-XHD
variants.description: Mid-sized professional RIB designed for high-payload rescue and crew transport.

variants.name: Profile 16 A-XHD
variants.description: Enhanced stability model with a wider beam for boarding operations and tactical gear.

variants.name: Profile 18 A-XHD
variants.description: Large-scale utility model for offshore patrol and heavy-duty logistics support.

variants.name: Profile 21 A-XHD
variants.description: High-capacity offshore variant with a reinforced transom for high-horsepower commercial applications.

variants.name: Profile 24 A-XHD
variants.description: The flagship XHD model, providing a massive platform for military transport and long-range utility.

name: Profile AS Series
description: The Profile AS (Aluminum Shallow V) series is designed for versatility and durability in thin water environments. Featuring a rugged 3.18mm marine-grade aluminum hull and a completely flat, non-skid deck, the AS series is ideal for passenger transport and light commercial utility. Its shallow V-design allows for easier beaching and operation in coastal shallows while maintaining the stability and safety inherent in a high-quality RIB.
features: Multiple Lifting Points and Towing Eyes
Aluminum Internal and External Transom Plates

variants.name: Profile 10 AS
variants.description: A compact aluminum utility RIB with a flat deck for easy movement.

variants.name: Profile 12 AS
variants.description: Mid-sized utility variant offering a spacious flat floor for gear or passengers.

variants.name: Profile 14 AS
variants.description: High-capacity open aluminum RIB for heavy-duty hauling and transport.

variants.name: Profile 18 AS
variants.description: The flagship of the AS series, providing a massive open flat-deck platform.

name: Profile F Series
description: The Profile F (Fiberglass) series is engineered for the rigorous demands of professional use. Built on a reinforced Deep-V fiberglass hull, these boats are specifically designed for search and rescue, law enforcement, and military patrol. The series features high-denier ORCA (CSM) fabrics and specialized commercial-grade components to ensure reliability and performance in the most challenging maritime environments.
features: Integrated Bow Locker and Anchor Storage

variants.name: Profile 14 F
variants.description: A compact professional fiberglass RIB for rapid response and coastal patrol.

variants.name: Profile 16 F
variants.description: Enhanced stability and interior volume for rescue and diving operations.

variants.name: Profile 19 F
variants.description: Heavy-duty offshore professional RIB with high payload capacity.

variants.name: Profile 24 F
variants.description: A large-scale platform for commercial transport and multi-agency support.

variants.name: Profile 28 F
variants.description: The flagship professional fiberglass model, designed for extreme offshore conditions.
